subject: A glowing magical lantern or floating light orb hovering above a forest path at night, illuminating footprints or a trail of energy on the ground
description: A small bright purple-pink light source hovers low to a dim forest floor, casting a soft magenta glow that lights up nearby foliage and reveals what appears to be a trail or footprints leading deeper into the woods. The surrounding forest is rendered in deep greens and near-blacks, with tree trunks and undergrowth fading into shadow on either side. The composition is investigative and quiet — no figures are present, only the light and the path it reveals. The overall mood is one of pursuit, mystery, and nocturnal tracking.
foreground: glowing magenta light, forest floor with leaves and trail markings
background: dark forest with tree trunks fading into shadow
